PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?character ?characterLabel WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P8345 wd:Q12391356 .
  ?game wdt:P674 ?character .
  ?character wdt:P97 ?title .
  ?title rdfs:label ?titleLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?titleLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?titleLabel) , "prince") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?titleLabel) , "king") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?titleLabel) , "queen") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?titleLabel) , "princess"))
  .
  ?character rdfs:label ?characterLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?characterLabel) = "en")
}
